movie.actors: Sylvester Stallone, Armand Assante, Rob Schneider, Jürgen Prochnow
movie.plot: In a dystopian future, Joseph Dredd, the most famous Judge (a police officer with instant field judiciary powers), is convicted for a crime he did not commit and must face his murderous counterpart.
movie.title: Judge Dredd
movie.writer: John Wagner (characters), Carlos Ezquerra (characters), Michael De Luca (story), William Wisher (story), William Wisher (screenplay), Steven E. de Souza (screenplay)
